    "R1.4": "The paragraph asserts novelty without specific contrast, but the relationship to Marquez & Tan (2021) is described inconsistently.",
    "R1.7": "The paragraph flags one missing or wrong citation (PPO source and RLAIF/self-rewarding precursors).",
    "RX.1": "The output presents some uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, but not consistently throughout the text.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly covers the agreed scope with one drift (novelty claim in paragraph 4).",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors and inconsistencies (e.g., 'no reward model' vs. 'PPO against a reward model').",

rationale.R1.4: The paragraph asserts novelty without specific contrast, but the relationship to Marquez & Tan (2021) is described inconsistently.
rationale.R1.7: The paragraph flags one missing or wrong citation (PPO source and RLAIF/self-rewarding precursors).
rationale.RX.1: The output presents some uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, but not consistently throughout the text.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers the agreed scope with one drift (novelty claim in paragraph 4).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors and inconsistencies (e.g., 'no reward model' vs. 'PPO against a reward model').
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability, and non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason.
